summary: My update() body itself must contain the deep-merge logic (isinstance dict checks + recursive self[key].update(value)) - that's the entire point of my assigned feature. Please layer @keep_features_dicts_synced around my update() implementation rather than replacing its body with a plain super().update(iterable, **kwds) delegate, or the deep-merge behavior will be lost. I've already removed my manual _column_requires_decoding[key] bookkeeping lines from update() below if your decorator recomputes it fully - just confirm the merge loop itself stays.
